task: Create the src/middleware directory if it doesn’t exist, then add src/middleware/fortress.js exporting an Express middleware and Koa middleware that set X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block, Referrer-Policy: no-referrer, and (when FORTRESS_HSTS=true) Strict-Transport-Security, plus an Express Router with GET /status/fo returning 200 and JSON { status: "ok", fortress: true }; update src/server.js to app.use the fortress middleware early and mount its router, and add test/test_fortress.test.js using supertest to verify the /status/fo response and presence of all security headers.
